name: Jump
description: A unit that has the Jump X keyword can make the Jump X Card action any time it could make a Move action. The unit makes a Move action as normal and can ignore or end its movement on top of terrain that is height X or lower. While making a Move with the Jump X action, a unit ignores the effects of diﬃcult terrain and other miniatures with a height equal to or lower than X. When making a Move with the Jump X action, a unit may place the Movement Tool overlapping impassable terrain but may not end its Move overlapping it. When a unit makes the Jump X action, measure height from that unit’s starting position.
